title: Support Bot Deployer: an AI support bot on Chatwoot, deployed in a day
content: I package support bot deployer as a done-for-you service built entirely on free, self-hosted open-source tooling (n8n, Chatwoot, Stirling-PDF, Listmonk). Starts at $199/mo, 90-99% margin, no SaaS fees. The whole system regenerates 50 ready-to-sell packages from one command. Agent-native business in 2026. #ai #automation #indiehacker #n8n #opensource
